{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Uncrowned title
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] intended to withdraw from the competition before taking an [[Uncrowned title]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
